title: No More Structures: Full
description: Removes every structure from the game.
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## Why
Part of early Minecraft's charm was the emptiness and loneliness of the world, the lack of structures making it feel isolated, yet more free and personal, as you stood on an untouched land.

## Mod's features
This mod tries to achieve this feel by removing every single structure, to truly give a sense of the world's emptiness.

_Supports 1.18.2 - 1.21_

## Notice
I will **not** be backporting to versions earlier than 1.18.2, as removing structures prior to that version is alot more difficult.
